settings.heading: About Us
settings.body: Meet the founding and leadership team guiding ell. across provider relationships, clinical review workflows, and institutional growth.

settings.name: Matt Stang
settings.bio: Matt Stang is a pioneer in the regulated health space leading and selling High Times before buying it back and cofounding a dozen companies in the regulated health space from peptides to psychedelics.
